_comment: Deployment facts for this project, read by morfdeploy. morfSync used to keep its binary in /usr/local/bin and its configuration in /etc/morfsync, alone in the parc. It now follows the same convention as every other service.
_comment_configs: 'migrate_from' lists the earlier homes of this file. The first one found is ADOPTED, not replaced by the example: settings edited by hand outlive the directory convention they were written under. morfSync has been moved once already, from /etc/homeserverhub, and that migration was hard-coded in its install script where nothing else could learn from it.
_comment_status: morfSync now serves /status per morfbeacon/1, alongside the /api/status its synchronisation clients already call. Both are kept: replacing one with the other would break callers to tidy a naming.
_comment_config_dir: La configuration vit dans /etc, pas a cote du binaire : c'est ou un administrateur Linux regarde en premier, et la FHS est explicite la-dessus. Effacer /opt/<service> pour reinstaller proprement n'emporte donc plus les reglages.
